entities.name: KALESHWARAM LIFT IRRIGATION PROJECT
entities.description: A major irrigation project and its command area in Telangana used for agricultural water supply.

entities.name: TELANGANA
entities.description: The state in India where the Kaleshwaram lift irrigation project is located.

entities.name: CROP WATER REQUIREMENTS
entities.description: The amount of water needed by crops for growth, which is monitored to assess irrigation impacts.

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL PRACTICES
entities.description: The methods and techniques used in farming, which can be changed by irrigation projects.

entities.name: WATER USAGE PATTERNS
entities.description: The way water is distributed and consumed in agriculture over time.

entities.name: WINTER RABI SEASON
entities.description: The winter cropping season used for comparing water needs between 2018-2019 and 2022-2023.

entities.name: GEOSPATIAL ASSESSMENT
entities.description: The process of mapping and analyzing spatial data to evaluate cropping patterns and water demand.

entities.name: SENTINEL-2 SATELLITE DATA
entities.description: Satellite imagery used to map major crops and their growing periods.

entities.name: GROUND DATA
entities.description: On-site data used in conjunction with satellite data for crop mapping.

entities.name: REFERENCE EVAPOTRANSPIRATION
entities.description: A measure used to quantify crop water requirements.

entities.name: FAO CROP COEFFICIENTS
entities.description: Standardized coefficients used to calculate specific crop water needs.

entities.name: RICE
entities.description: A major crop that showed a significant increase in cultivation in the winter season.

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE WATER MANAGEMENT
entities.description: Practices aimed at ensuring long-term availability and efficient use of water resources.

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL RESILIENCE
entities.description: The capacity of agricultural systems to recover from or adapt to changes and stresses.

entities.name: RESOURCE CONSERVATION
entities.description: The practice of protecting and preserving natural resources like water.
